reason: Commit 93db4c34 renamed the feature folder from a stale ChromeStatus listing slug to the current milestone-150 listing slug so the release page links and the server route resolve. All six interactive concepts and the conformance suite carried over unchanged (git rename R100); the ChromeStatus feature identity (5117170452398080) is preserved. Recorded here so the old URL keeps resolving via a tested alias redirect and the route gate permits the move.
evidence: git show 93db4c34 (R100 renames, index.html H1/title realigned to feature 5117170452398080); routes/aliases.ts serves a 301 from the old route to the new one.
